item.title: YouTube raises subscription prices in US for the first time in 3 years
item.description: YouTube on Friday raised subscription prices in the United States, with increases of up to $4 set to вҖӢtake effect from the next billing cycle.

item.title: Outflows from leveraged loan funds jump as investors shun credit risk
item.description: U.S. leveraged loan funds are suffering heavy outflows this year as investors grow more cautious about credit risk while broader concerns mount over вҖӢredemption pressures and limited transparency in private credit markets.

item.title: Ackman's $64 billion Universal bet hinges on power broker Bollore
item.description: Bill Ackman's first call before launching his $64 billion bid for Universal Music Group this week was to French billionaire Vincent Bollore, the U.S. hedge fund manager said.

item.title: Exclusive: Impactive aims to replace WEX CEO on board in proxy fight, sources say
item.description: Impactive Capital is urging WEX shareholders to replace the company's long-serving CEO on вҖӢits board of directors at next month's annual meeting as the activist investor presses on with a board вҖҢchallenge, according to sources and documents seen by Reuters.

item.title: US factory orders unchanged in February for second straight month
item.description: New orders for U.S. factory goods were unchanged for a second straight month вҖӢin February as weak demand for commercial вҖҢaircraft offset gains elsewhere.

item.title: OpenAI faces tighter regulation under EU's Digital Service Act, Handelsblatt says
item.description: OpenAI and its chatbot вҖӢChatGPT is set вҖҢto be classified as a very вҖӢlarge search вҖӢengine and fall under вҒ the European вҖӢUnion's Digital Services вҖӢAct (DSA), meaning it faces tighter regulation, Germany's Handelsblatt вҖӢnewspaper said вҖӢon Friday, citing sources.

item.title: US consumer sentiment dives to a record low in April amid Iran war
item.description: U.S. consumer sentiment plunged to a record low in early April and consumers anticipated a вҖӢsurge in inflation in the next 12 вҖҢmonths, a survey showed on Friday.

item.title: Iran war leaves crisis-scarred countries counting the cost
item.description: Sanoj Weeratunge thought this would finally be the year his tour firm put Sri вҖӢLanka's spate of crises behind it. Then the Iran war erupted 2,700 miles away, the government hiked fuel prices by 35% and business slumped almost a third.

item.title: Meta must face youth addiction lawsuit by Massachusetts, court rules
item.description: Meta Platforms must face a lawsuit by Massachusetts' attorney general alleging that the Facebook and Instagram parent deliberately designed features to addict young users, the state's top court ruled on Friday.

item.title: Exclusive: Swiss bank Julius Baer initiates search to replace its CFO, sources say
item.description: Julius Baer is considering replacing its вҖӢchief financial officer, two people вҖҢfamiliar with discussions said, a step that would round вҖӢoff a shake-up in вҖӢthe private bank's top вҒ management since it racked вҖӢup heavy losses linked to вҖӢrisky lending.

item.title: Lockheed Martin secures $4.7 billion Patriot missile interceptor production contract
item.description: Lockheed Martin said on вҖӢFriday the U.S. government вҖҢawarded the defense giant a $4.7 billion preliminary contract to вҖӢcontinue critical accelerated production вҖӢof PAC-3 Missile Segment Enhancement.

item.title: VIEW March inflation report, first to showВ impact of war, is in line with expectations
item.description: U.S. consumer prices rose 3.3% from a year ago in March, data showed, giving investors a first glimpse of the impact on prices of the U.S.-Israeli war against Iran.

item.title: CoreWeave strikes AI cloud deal with Anthropic, shares rise
item.description: Cloud infrastructure firm CoreWeave said on Friday it has struck a deal with Anthropic to supply the AI startup вҖӢwith cloud computing capacity, sending its shares up вҖҢmore than 5% in premarket trading.

item.title: China warns online travel platforms against automated train ticket programmes
item.description: Chinese authorities summoned seven online platforms selling train вҖӢtickets including Trip.com , Meituan , Tongcheng вҖҢand Alibaba's Fliggy, warning the firms against disruptive, automated ticketing programmes.

item.title: Geospatial analytics firm HawkEye 360 files for US IPO
item.description: Geospatial analytics company HawkEye 360 вҖӢon Friday filed for вҖҢan initial public offering in the United States.

item.title: Traders keep bets the fed will stay on hold all 2026
item.description: Traders on Friday kept вҖӢbets the Federal вҖҢReserve will leave interest rates вҖӢon hold вҖӢthrough the end of вҒ 2026 after вҖӢthe Labor Department вҖӢreported consumer prices surged in March, вҖӢas expected.

item.title: US consumer prices surged in March
item.description: Consumer prices increased by the most in nearly four years as the war with Iran boosted oil prices and the pass-through from tariffs persisted, further diminishing chances for an вҖҢinterest rate cut this year.

item.title: Glencore buys 45% stake in South Carolina aluminium recycling plant
item.description: Glencore on Friday said вҖӢit acquired вҖҢa 45% stake in an вҖӢaluminium recycling вҖӢand remelting plant вҒ near Charleston, вҖӢSouth Carolina, strengthening вҖӢthe miner's position in the U.S. вҖӢaluminium вҖӢsupply chain.

item.title: Lithium bulls set to gatecrash Chile's copper party
item.description: Chile is set to break with precedent and open its annual global copper gathering next вҖӢweek with a day of panels devoted to lithium, as it seeks to decisively diversify beyond the red metal that has powered its economy вҖҢfor decades.

item.title: Exclusive: Fed's Daly says oil shock means getting inflation down takes longer
item.description: San Francisco Federal Reserve President Mary Daly said the U.S. economy is fundamentally solid, the вҖӢlabor market has steadied, and monetary policy is in a "good place" -- restrictive enough to put downward pressure on inflation without undercutting the labor market.

item.title: Snap unit to use Qualcomm chips for upcoming AI smart glasses
item.description: Specs, the Snap smart glasses unit formed early this year, will use Qualcomm вҖӢchips for its upcoming devices under a вҖҢmulti-year deal announced on Friday, marking its first major move.

item.title: UK threatens tech bosses with jail if they fail to remove non-consensual intimate images
item.description: Britain on Friday warned tech bosses they could be held personally liable and face imprisonment if their platforms fail вҖӢto remove intimate images shared without consent when required вҖҢto do so.

item.title: U.S. equity fund inflows surge on optimism over Mideast ceasefire
item.description: U.S. investors ramped up purchases of equity funds in the week to April 8, as вҖӢhopes for a two-week Middle East ceasefire boosted вҖҢexpectations for a reopening of the Strait of Hormuz to oil and gas flows.

item.title: Global equity fund inflows surge on Middle East ceasefire boost
item.description: Global equity fund inflows nearly doubled in the week through April 8 as a two-week Middle East ceasefire raised hopes вҖӢof a resumption of shipments through the Strait of вҖҢHormuz.

item.title: The unconventional logic behind SpaceX's $1.75 trillion price tag
item.description: Wall Street is reaching for some unusual yardsticks to price Elon Musk's SpaceX.

item.title: Morning Bid: Back from the brink?
item.description: Everything Mike Dolan and the ROI team are excited to read, watch and listen to over the weekend.

item.title: Big Tech puts financial heft behind next-gen nuclear power as AI demand surges
item.description: Big Tech is reshaping the funding landscape for new nuclear technologies as it seeks to bolster electricity supply for вҖӢpower-hungry AI data centers, inking deals that offer nuclear companies both funding and a clearer path to making money.

item.title: Warburg Pincus, Munich Re arm team up to invest in Europe's defence sector
item.description: U.S. private equity firm Warburg Pincus has launched an investment platform focused вҖӢon Europe's defence and security вҖҢsector, with MEAG, the asset manager of reinsurer Munich Re , joining as an early investor.

item.title: US trade court weighs legality of Trump 10% global tariff
item.description: A U.S. trade court on Friday will consider the legality of a 10% global import tax imposed by the Trump administration, which вҖӢseveral states and small businesses say sidesteps a U.S. Supreme Court ruling вҖҢthat invalidated most of Trump's previous tariffs.

item.title: US utility stocks are off to their best start since 2019. Can they keep it up?
item.description: U.S. utility stocks marked their вҖӢstrongest start to the year since 2019, benefiting from an investor retreat from riskier assets during the Iran вҖҢwar and strong electricity demand from firms building out artificial intelligence infrastructure.
